files_modified.purpose: Pure layout engine with ATS-compatible CV and cover letter rendering functions

commit_subject: feat(T002): create lib/template.typ pure layout engine
commit_body: Implements render_cv(data, variant) and render_cover_letter(data, variant) with ATS constraints (set text(ligatures: false), single-column page), font fallback chain (Roboto -> DejaVu Sans -> Libertinus Serif -> Helvetica), and all section renderers (header, summary, experience, education, skills, projects, ai_policy, job_target). Each function accepts resolved data from the dictionary with variant-aware content resolution. Missing optional keys silently skip; empty arrays produce no output.

validation.command: typst compile _test.typ _test.pdf (test entry point that imports and invokes the template)
validation.summary: CV compilation succeeded (exit 0) with only expected font fallback warnings. Cover letter compilation also succeeded (exit 0). Both PDFs non-empty (67KB and 14KB).

reasoning.approach: Build a pure function module with private helpers for variant resolution, entry resolution, and section rendering; render_cv orchestrates page setup, variant resolution, and sequential section rendering

key_decisions.decision: Accept a variant parameter in render_cv and render_cover_letter
key_decisions.rationale: Data dict contains variant-keyed dictionaries (general/embedded/enterprise) for summary, experience descriptions, education details, and project descriptions; internal _resolve helper extracts the correct variant

key_decisions.decision: Font chain: Roboto, DejaVu Sans, Libertinus Serif, Helvetica
key_decisions.rationale: Follows task specification (Roboto -> DejaVu Sans -> Libertinus Serif) with Helvetica as reliable macOS-native ultimate fallback

key_decisions.decision: _resolve_entries/_resolve_education/_resolve_projects map over arrays to resolve variant content in each entry
key_decisions.rationale: Experience, education, and project entries contain variant-keyed description/role fields that must be resolved before passing to section renderers

key_decisions.decision: Use data.at() with default values for all key accesses
key_decisions.rationale: Ensures missing keys produce empty/default values instead of crashes; empty arrays are guarded by .len() > 0 checks
